chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1127 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.925/2025 (Contempt Appln) 30.05.2025 Mr. Hamid Ali Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< In compliance of earlier order, the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh has filed a statement, which reflects that the appointments of the petitioners were found bogus by the Inquiry Committee. No case for initiating contempt proceedings is made out. Consequently, the listed application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
